content:
IVX NEXT BLOCK — SUPABASE DONE, FINISH DEPLOYMENT EVIDENCE

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Current fact:
Supabase tables are done.

Do NOT keep asking about Supabase tables.
Do NOT repeat generic missing-access messages.

MISSION:
Finish deployment evidence by testing GitHub, Render, Production, and Supabase with exact proof.

STEP 1 — SUPABASE CONFIRMATION

Verify existing tables only:

- members
- member_verifications
- verification_codes
- investor_profiles
- crm_members
- project_media
- project_videos
- project_likes
- project_comments
- project_shares
- project_saves
- project_analytics

Return:
SUPABASE_STATUS:
TABLES_VERIFIED:
ROW_COUNTS:
READ_TEST:
WRITE_TEST:
ERROR:

STEP 2 — GITHUB LIVE TEST

Do not say “missing access” without a real API test.

Test GitHub now.

Return:
GITHUB_STATUS:
REPO:
BRANCH:
LATEST_SHA:
COMMIT_URL:
PUSH_PERMISSION:
HTTP_STATUS:
ERROR:

If GitHub fails, return exact:
401 / 403 / 404 / missing token / wrong repo / wrong scope

STEP 3 — RENDER LIVE TEST

Do not say “missing access” without a real API test.

Test Render now.

Return:
RENDER_STATUS:
SERVICE_NAME:
SERVICE_ID:
LATEST_DEPLOY_ID:
DEPLOYED_SHA:
AUTO_DEPLOY:
CONNECTED_REPO:
CONNECTED_BRANCH:
HTTP_STATUS:
ERROR:

If Render fails, return exact:
401 / 403 / missing API key / wrong service / webhook error

STEP 4 — PRODUCTION LIVE TEST

Test:

GET https://api.ivxholding.com/health
GET https://api.ivxholding.com/version
GET https://ivxholding.com
GET https://chat.ivxholding.com

Return:
URL:
HTTP_STATUS:
RESPONSE_BODY:
RESPONSE_TIME:
ERROR:

STEP 5 — COMMIT MATCH

Compare:

GitHub SHA
Render deployed SHA
Health SHA
Version SHA

Return:
COMMIT_MATCH:
MATCH_DETAILS:
ERROR:

STEP 6 — FEATURE SMOKE TEST

Test live:

- registration
- email verification
- SMS verification
- member dashboard
- admin members
- project media
- video cards
- likes
- comments
- shares
- saves
- analytics
- chat
- owner AI

Return each as:
VERIFIED
FAILED
UNVERIFIED
BLOCKED

Include exact evidence or error.

STEP 7 — FINAL OUTPUT ONLY

SUPABASE_STATUS:
GITHUB_STATUS:
RENDER_STATUS:
PRODUCTION_STATUS:
COMMIT_MATCH:
FEATURE_RESULTS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:
VERIFIED
FAILED
BLOCKED
UNVERIFIED

Rules:
No placeholders.
No fake SHAs.
No fake deploy IDs.
No generic “missing credentials.”
Every access claim must include HTTP status or exact runtime error.
